name: Dataset Card Review
description: Review a dataset card for completeness, lineage, schema, intended use, limitations, and publication readiness.

inputs.description: Dataset identifier, local path, or card URL.
Expected task, modality, or benchmark context for the dataset.
Optional draft dataset card or README content to review.

permissions.description: Read dataset card, repository metadata, license, task tags, and public dataset metadata.

approval_points.description: Confirm card gaps, suggested fixes, and publication caveats before handoff.
Publish dataset card changes outside the local workspace.

phases.name: Card Intake
phases.objective: Capture dataset identity, revision, license, task context, and available card sections.

phases.name: Schema And Usage
phases.objective: Review schema, splits, labels, intended use, out-of-scope use, and known limitations.

phases.name: Card Gap Review
phases.objective: Identify missing card metadata, provenance, license notes, evaluation context, and risk disclosures.

phases.name: Handoff
phases.objective: Prepare card patch notes, publication decision, and evidence-backed review summary.

required_outputs.description: Dataset identity, task context, card state, and review scope.
Dataset source, revision, splits, and fingerprint when available.
Features, labels, splits, examples, and schema gaps.
Intended use, limitations, license, privacy, and safety notes.
Card completeness review and prioritized gaps.
Suggested card updates, caveats, and publication decision notes.

artifacts.description: Proposed dataset card changes and rationale.
Missing or weak card sections with severity and evidence.

verifiers.description: Dataset source, revision, split mapping, and fingerprint are recorded when available.
Feature schema, labels, nulls, and split information are documented or explicitly missing.
Dataset card metadata, license, task tags, intended use, and limitations are reviewed.
Review findings cite card text, repository metadata, manifest, and gap table entries.
